payload.title: Windows Operator Surface adapter materializers belong to Windows User or PC Site authority
payload.summary: The Operator Surface architecture chapter defined the primitive and Windows adapter path, but did not implement materializers. Windows Terminal profile writes, Komorebi rules, YASB buttons, and AHK launch/focus scripts are Windows User Site or PC Site adapter mutations, not Narada proper mutations by convenience.
evidence: Narada proper docs now define Operator Surface, AgentRuntime, ControlChannel, SessionBinding, operator_surfaces, session_bindings, inspection posture, and Windows adapter plan.
Adapter materialization would mutate Windows Terminal, Komorebi, YASB, or AHK configuration and must run at the owning Windows User/PC authority locus.
proposal: Route future implementation to the Windows User Site or PC Site inbox as dry-run-first materializer tasks with CEIZ/equivalent command execution and mutation evidence.
